name: Greedy Volume Maximization of Gradient Embeddings for Long-Tailed Frame-Level Bioacoustic Active Learning

description: arXiv:2607.13555v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Bioacoustic call-type classification relies on costly expert annotation. Active learning can reduce this burden by selecting a small batch of segments for expert annotation and using the labeled segments for training the classifier. The setting is hard: the target calls are extremely sparse and the call-type distribution is long-tailed, so a tig...
